overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot traversing vast rolling desert sand dunes in a high-fidelity game engine environment. The scene features warm golden lighting under a clear blue sky with no visible vegetation, structures, or life forms—just endless sandy terrain.

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding over desert dunes in a drone, surveying the vast empty landscape

entered.detail: golden sand dunes in immediate foreground with visible ripples and texture
large curved sand dune forming the main terrain feature
layered mountain-like dunes fading into the distance
cloudless deep blue sky dominating the upper frame

segments.scene_description: The camera smoothly traverses an endless desert landscape of rolling golden sand dunes under a clear blue sky. The terrain is completely devoid of vegetation or structures, consisting only of wind-sculpted sand formations that stretch to the horizon. The drone maintains a steady aerial glide over the undulating dunes, capturing the warm midday light casting subtle shadows across the rippled sand surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide across a vast, undulating desert landscape of golden sand dunes under a clear blue sky. It begins by traversing an endless expanse of wind-sculpted formations that stretch toward the horizon, completely devoid of vegetation or structures. As the drone maintains its steady movement, the camera captures the interplay of warm midday light and subtle shadows across the rippled surfaces of the terrain. The scene then expands further over the rolling dunes, emphasizing the seamless and repetitive nature of the sandy environment before continuing its smooth trajectory across the desolate vista.
